prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens with a wide aerial view of a desert canyon landscape. A tall rock formation dominates the foreground, with a small blue vehicle visible on top. A large Chevrolet bowtie logo appears centered over the scene, with tiny unreadable fine print near the bottom.

The scene then cuts to a black Chevrolet pickup or SUV driving along a wooded road. Two people are visible through the windshield. A close-up follows of a golden retriever inside a vehicle, leaning toward an open side window and yawning or panting as trees blur outside.

Next, a white Chevrolet SUV drives on a multi-lane road or bridge. A man and woman are visible in the front seats, smiling. The montage then shows rapid travel imagery: a blurred view past a tall white monument resembling an obelisk, a dry open landscape under a blue sky, sunlight flashing through trees, elevated highway ramps, and a sunset scene with water and silhouetted vegetation.

A tunnel scene follows, looking outward toward a large suspension bridge visible in the distance. Several cars drive through the tunnel. A red Chevrolet convertible sports car then appears in motion on a road at sunset. After that, a dark Chevrolet truck tows a large trailer or camper along a sunlit road.

The commercial shifts to a nighttime or neon-lit urban/entertainment setting. A blonde woman is seen through the side window of a red vehicle, with bright reflected signs and lights around her. A blurred close-up shot with colorful lights leads into a scene of the same woman dancing closely with a man in a lively, neon-lit venue.

The next scene shows people standing in a park facing the Gateway Arch, framed by leafless trees. A man then smiles while holding up a camera, as if taking a photo. The montage cuts to a close-up of a blue Chevrolet Equinox being plugged in to charge, followed by the blue electric-looking SUV driving on a forest road.

Inside another vehicle, a wide rear-seat view shows several passengers under a large panoramic glass roof, looking forward toward a city street. A black Chevrolet pickup then drives near a lake or body of water with mountains in the background, passing rocks in the foreground. A close-up of a young woman with curly hair seated inside a vehicle follows; she looks toward the camera with a slight smile.

The commercial then shows Chevrolet dealership exteriors. One frame shows a blue Chevrolet building with palm trees, an American flag, and a nearby sign reading “PARTS-S…” partially cut off. Another shows a dealership lot with many parked vehicles, a “TRUCKS” sign, an American flag, and a blue building marked “CHEVROLET.”

The montage returns to the blue SUV driving from an overhead rear angle on a two-lane road lined with trees. A red convertible appears again with two people riding with the top down. A close-up inside a vehicle shows an older woman with long gray hair smiling and looking upward or out the window. Another close-up shows a hand petting a golden retriever’s head in warm evening light.

Near the end, a blue Chevrolet pickup is parked on a rocky cliff or mesa at sunset. A person sits on rocks nearby with a dog. The final frame pulls back to a wide canyon view with the blue truck on top of a tall rock formation. The Chevrolet bowtie logo and the word “CHEVROLET” appear centered, with the visible tagline “Together let’s drive” underneath.
